title: supervisor: health-check loop, restart herdr when down (injectable restart action)
action: Supervisor loop: ping herdr via HerdrControl on interval; on Unavailable, invoke an injectable Restart action (real impl spawns 'herdr --session <name> server' headless; test impl records calls). Backoff between restart attempts. Never disturbs a live agent (agent-outlives-service). Reports transitions up/down.
verify: cargo test --quiet supervisor && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings

trace.outcome: Supervisor: health-check loop pinging herdr, restart via injectable RestartAction (SpawnHerdr spawns 'herdr --session X server' headless), backoff, transition-only reporting, never force-kills. Committed a7e4a87.
trace.verification_evidence: 3 supervisor tests pass: up_herdr_does_not_restart, down_herdr_triggers_restart, recovery_after_restart_reports_up. clippy clean.
trace.verify_output: 3 supervisor tests: up=no-restart, down=restart(injectable), recovery reports up; clippy clean
trace.verify_command: cargo test supervisor && cargo clippy -- -D warnings
